name: $gameAddScore
description: Adds or subtracts points from a player. Returns the new score.

name: $gameExists
description: Returns true if a session with the given UUID exists (in any state).

name: $gameGetData
description: Retrieves a value from the session's data store.

name: $gameInfo
description: Returns a specific field from a session as JSON. Fields: id|type|status|difficulty|playerCount|maxPlayers|hostId|guildId|channelId|startedAt|endedAt|timeoutMs

name: $gameIsActive
description: Returns true if the session is in the active (started) state.

name: $gameLeaderboard
description: Returns a JSON array of players sorted by score (highest first).

args.name: limit
args.description: How many entries to return (default: all)

name: $gamePlayerExists
description: Returns true if the user has joined the session.

name: $gamePlayerScore
description: Returns the score of a player in the session.

args.name: userID
args.description: User to look up (defaults to command caller)

name: $gameSetData
description: Stores a key-value pair in the session's data store.

name: $gameHangmanGuess
description: Guesses a letter. Returns JSON: { letter, correct, wrongCount, maxWrong, masked, guessed, won, lost, correctWord, pointsEarned }.

name: $gameNewHangman
description: Starts a Hangman round. Returns JSON: { wordLength, maxWrong, masked, guessed, wrongCount }.

name: $gameMathAnswer
description: Submits a numeric answer. Returns JSON: { correct, answer, correctAnswer, pointsEarned, score }.

name: $gameNewMath
description: Generates a new math question. Returns JSON: { question, points }.

name: $gameNewRps
description: Initialises an RPS round. Returns JSON: { challenger, opponent, isBotOpponent }. Omit opponentID for bot play.

name: $gameRpsChoice
description: Submits a rock/paper/scissors choice. Returns JSON with result once both players have chosen.

name: $gameNewScramble
description: Generates a scrambled word. Returns JSON: { scrambled, wordLength, points, difficulty }.

name: $gameScrambleAnswer
description: Submits a scramble answer. Returns JSON: { correct, answer, correctWord, pointsEarned, score }.

name: $gameCreate
description: Creates a new game session. Returns a UUID that identifies this session — pass it to all other $game* functions.

args.name: type
args.description: Game type: trivia | wordle | math | hangman | scramble | tictactoe | rps

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild to associate with this session

args.name: channelID
args.description: Channel to associate with this session

name: $gameEnd
description: Ends and destroys a game session by its UUID.

name: $gameJoin
description: Adds a player to a waiting game session.

name: $gameLeave
description: Removes a player from a game session.

args.name: userID
args.description: User to remove (defaults to command caller)

name: $gameStart
description: Starts a game session and begins its timeout timer.

name: $gameNewTicTacToe
description: Sets up a Tic-Tac-Toe board. Returns JSON: { board, playerX, playerO, currentTurn }. board is 9-element array of "X", "O", or null.

args.name: opponentID
args.description: User ID of the O player

name: $gameTicTacToeMove
description: Makes a move (position 1–9). Returns JSON: { board, position, symbol, winner, draw, nextTurn, playerX, playerO, pointsEarned }.

name: $gameNewTrivia
description: Loads a new trivia question into the session. Returns JSON: { question, choices, category, points }.

name: $gameTriviaAnswer
description: Submits an answer to the current trivia question. Returns JSON: { correct, answer, correctAnswer, pointsEarned, score }.

name: $gameEvent
description: Returns data from the current ForgeGames event payload as JSON. Use inside game event handlers.

name: $gameGuildSessions
description: Returns a JSON array of all sessions in a guild, optionally filtered by channel.

name: $gameStats
description: Returns statistics for a player in the session as JSON.

args.name: userID
args.description: User to look up (defaults to caller)

name: $gameNewWordle
description: Starts a new Wordle round. Returns JSON: { maxGuesses, difficulty, wordLength }.

name: $gameWordleGuess
description: Submits a 5-letter Wordle guess. Returns JSON: { guess, tiles, tileArray, guessNumber, guessesLeft, maxGuesses, won, lost, correctWord, pointsEarned }.

name: $gameWordleGuessCount
description: Returns JSON: { guessesUsed, guessesLeft, maxGuesses, history } with the full guess/tile history.
